list.txt: - Todo muy bien. La ubicación excelente. Muy luminoso. Tal cual aparece en la a fotos. Recomendable.

- I had a great stay. The apartment was exactly as described, very clean and comfortable. The location is perfect and everything was easy. Verónica was very kind and helpful, she even shared amazing local food recommendations which made my trip even better. Highly recommended!

- Owner Juan Carlos met us at the apartment when we arrived in order to show us around the home. He very kindly had wine, juice, milk, pastries, and candies waiting for us. It’s obvious that Juan Carlos takes pride in his home with the charming decor and the thoughtful touches (including travel books). The location was unbeatable. We were close to every major sight. In fact, we walked everywhere rather than take the metro, we were so centrally located. We were a 5 minute walk to the famous Puerta del Sol and just a 15 minute walk to the Prado. We had a very pleasant stay. I’d highly recommend staying at Juan Carlos’ apartment!

- Appartement spacieux très bien équipé et propre, extrêmement bien situé, à proximité de toutes les activités et des commerces. Tout peut se faire à pied. Bien que situé dans un quartier animé, l'appartement est très calme et donne sur des cours intérieures.
- Very nice apartment and location. Host was responsive and helpful.
We were not in the apartment much but it was a perfect location and the host was great!! - The location was perfect!! We were a family of 7 it was great!
I would recommend to everyone - It was very clean and close to the center and everything worked fine in the Apartment Nothing it’s was perfect

- Localização perfeita para a grande maioria das atrações!! A anfitriã foi muito atenciosa, já estava aguardando pela nossa chegada na entrada do prédio. Tinha uma garrafa de vinho de cortesia para nós!! Apartamento limpo, tudo organizado e muito aconchegante!!
We loved it here, we felt like home and the neighbourhood is very cool too. - Close to Madrid’s city centre. It fits big groups. —-
- Appartement très bien équipé et calme. Quartier vivant, accès à pied au centre de Madrid. Parfait!

Excellent séjour avec toutes facilités pour découvrir Madrid - proximité immédiate de la plaza Major; propreté irréprochable du logement Accueil très chaleureux et très sympathique de notre hôte qui nous a donné de très utiles informations et nous a offert très gentiment quelques gourmandises de la région. Nous recommandons cet appartement sans aucune hésitation Rien
- La posizione, l'ampiezza dell'appartamento e la gentilezza dei proprietari. Le camere doppie sono un po' piccole
- Great location, very clean and the owners really nice people.
Heerlijk verblijf voor mooie stad Madrid - Mooi in de oude wijk
- Casa molto bella e arredata con gusto, dotata di tutto il necessario e anche di più. Posizione eccellente. Host super gentile e accogliente. Tutto perfetto
Excellent - There are no comments available for this review

Excellent for families and business trips. - - Excellent location, restaurants and attractions are easily accessible. Metro station nearby. - Very friendly hosts. Coffee, milk, orange juice, breakfast pastries provided, we even got a bottle of delicious wine.

Excellent, comfortable apartment with everything you need for a great stay. Communication with the owners was great befo - The property was exactly as advertised and exceptionally clean. It was in a great location too Nothing
Fantastisch - Heel ruim,proper en gezellig. Dicht bij alles in het centrum. Zeker aan te bevelen.

Fantastic apartment in a fantastic location. - The property is a gem of a find. Fantastic location and a very comfortable place to stay. Conveniently located in central Madrid and easy to get to all tourist attractions. There are plenty of good restaurants close by.
- Ubicación privilegiada en un barrio muy lindo. El dueño fantástico.
Great location, very cosy, would stay again - Perfect location close to restaurants and the historical sites One night was loud.
- Very clean appartement , so good location , fourniture in good condition None
Excelente ubicacion - Ubicacion y salon con salida a pequeña terraza Muy luminoso

Great location amongst the rooftops of Madrid - Fantastic attic apartment that was i. A great location, good facilities and comfortable bed. Nice welcome pack of pastries and wine. Good host who took time to show us how to use everything. The only small thing was the shower tray which filled with water and you had to wait for it to empty before opening the shower door so it didn’t flood the bathroom - I think maybe there is a blockage somewhere
Wir würden die Wohnung wieder buchen. - Sehr schöne, helle und geräumige Wohnung an sehr zentraler Lage. Obwohl mitten im Zentrum, ist es in den beiden Schlafzimmern sehr ruhig.
- Bien placé, terrasse. Lumineux..Cosy. Il aurait été utile d'avoir deux jeux de clés car ma fille avait des activités et des horaires différents de nous. Ça nous a pas mal contraint. Dommage.

Tengo muchas ganas de volver - El check in y los detalles. Tengo muchas ganas de volver. Hay un olor raro en el baño pero es de la antigüedad de la propiedad y las tuberías. Es mejor saberlo, pero igualmente regresaría. Dejaba la ventana abierta para airear. :) Tengo muchas ganas de volver.
- Nos recibieron muy amablemente. Un encanto los dueños! Habitaciones limpias, baño impecable con todo lo necesario. Excelente ubicación Todo perfecto

- Estaba súper limpio, estuvimos con las niñas era espacioso así que estuvimos cómodos, había todo lo necesario, la anfitriona Verónica un sol, nos dejó alguna cosa para desayunar y un vinito para brindar, un gran detallazo. Hemos estado muy aguusto
- lokalita super

Location, Accommodations and Host truly were the best! - I travel quite a bit and when I find a location that deserves a 10 star, this is it! The location was clean, quiet in the evening, hot water, comfy bed and pillows, coffee milk sweet treats and juice were provided by the host for breakfast. Immediately outside the front door was the bus to Plaza España and a grocery store. Around the corner is a bus to Plaza Mayor. But honestly I was able to walk about to both Espana and Mayor with no problem, restaurants, parks and shopping all along the way. Host greeted us on our arrival and shared many piece of information about the city that were extremely helpful. Highly recommend. Nothing to say here
Sin duda repetiré,todo de 10 - There are no comments available for this review

Super, polecam, wrócę 😀 - Przestronny, wygodny apartament, super wyposażona kuchnia. Obok sklep, 400 metrów do stacji metra. Dojazd na Santiago Bernabeu znakomity około 35 minut. Świetny dojazd do centrum. Do Pałacu Królewskiego spacerkiem 20 minut. Okolica przyjemna. Przesympatyczny właściciel, bardzo życzliwy, opowiedział o ważnych sprawach dotyczących pobytu, podarował nam pyszne winko, kapsułki do kawy i bułeczki. Wrócimy tu jeszcze. Wszystko było ok.

Good apartment. Great location. - Location was outstanding. Accommodation was well equipped. The decorating was fun and colourful. Check-in is 4pm and we had to wait to be shown in. Self check-in would have been much better. The apartment had a bad plumbing smell when we got there and we had to air it out and the toilet brush holder was old and full of dirty toilet water.
Una piacevole vacanza za - Location, padroni di casa e comodità per il centro L'ultima notte al piano di sopra vicini molto rumorosi fino alle 2 di notte
Au top - L’accueil exceptionnel. Le confort des matelas et oreillers. La propreté et appartement spacieux Rien . Une petite suggestion : un deuxième trousseau de clés.
- Very spacious, good value for group of 8. Bit too large and expensive for a family of four.

Lovely apartment - Really nice apartment on the ground floor Bus stop right outside and close to a metro station Netflix would be a great bonus Sometimes it's just nice to chill in the evening with some TV Lovely location in a really nice neighbourhood but just to note the apartment is Latina and not the livelier district of La Latina...

Good apartment in a central location for sightseeing in the beautiful city of Madrid! - Very central location. Good communication with host-helpful information provided by him for a great stay. Apartment has 3 bedrooms, one full bathroom and a second toilet with wash hand basin, well equipped kitchen, and pleasant lounge and dining area. We also enjoyed the complimentary bottle of wine, orange juice, croissants and muffins. Thank you so much Nothing
整体都还挺好的，很方便，楼下有很多餐厅，街角那家的炖牛尾非常棒 - 房屋离太阳门广场很近，到景点都很方便，特别是位置非常好，坐地铁建议直接到太阳门广场Sol站，如果到另一个地铁站没有电梯，从地铁出来提行李要走很长的楼梯，房间整体都挺好，房主很热情，设施也很齐全，我们有做饭吃也很方便 唯一的问题是，浴室的下水水流的很慢，有点积水
- Très bel appartement, loueur réactif et très sympathique, très bien pour une famille La localisation, un peu loin du centre.
Great value for money and fab location - Great location, great host and clean apartment. Plenty space for the 3 of us. The pillows in the bedroom could be firmer and maybe 2 each.

A Cost-effective Option for larger households and groups. - The location is relatively convenient, with attractions within walking distance (provided you're reasonably fit). The bus stop is a 300-metre walk uphill or downhill, while the underground station is just over a kilometre away. Near the bus stop is a supermarket, and the surrounding area boasts numerous small shops, bars, and restaurants. The accommodation features eight beds, accommodating up to eight guests. Hygiene standards are commendable, with the bathroom, hot water supply, and kitchen all functioning well. Cookware and crockery are provided. While the facilities are relatively dated, they are well-maintained. Please note that their operation may produce considerable noise. Overall, this represents a cost-effective option for larger households and groups. The neighbours nearby make noise at night, regardless of whether it's a weekend or weekday, though weekends are particularly excessive – they party until after two in the morning. Regarding this, the landlord will tell you it's legal in Spain and there's nothing he can do about it. The heating is relatively cold; you can turn it up a bit. There's only one key, so everyone must leave together. If there are many people, be mindful of this. The landlord's identity remains unknown, though the caretaker may vary. We encountered a rather sensitive young chap who seemed quite apprehensive about us causing trouble.

- Très bon séjour chez Veronica. Petites attentions à l'arrivée (gâteaux, jus de fruits, café, une bouteille de vin blanc). Appartement très propre au rez-de-chaussée. Bonne literie. Transports en communs très proches pour aller au centre ville. 20 minutes à pied pour aller à la plaza Mayor. Quartier sympa avec des commerces et restaurants. Horaires à respecter. Facturation en sus si on arrive après 20h et départ à 11h précise.

Muy recomendable. - Realmente me pareció genial todo, menos el precio que lo vi algo caro, pero todo estupendo. La amabilidad de Juan Carlos, la luminosidad del apartamento, la ubicación, camas muy cómodas ... todo. Se podría poner alguna silla en el dormitorio. Nosotros metimos la de la terraza.

- Loved the hosts who met us on site and made sure we were comfortable and told us so much about the area. Apartment was very clean and spacious. Location was perfect!!! TV and hairdryer didn't work. Both need replacing

Fab apartment - I had a great stay at this apartment. It was spotless with everything you need for a comfortable visit. The location was fantastic - nestled in a vibrant area full of bars and delicious food options, yet still close to beautiful parks, making it perfect for families. The owner was communicative, ensuring our stay was seamless. The Funky colorful decor made our kid very happy. I would highly recommend this place to anyone looking for a delightful and convenient home away from home. The apartment is next to a bus stop and a school so the mornings can be a little noisy. Fine for us but not ideal for late sleepers. Just a personal preference but if you are fussy about pillows. Bring your own :-)
性价比还可以 - 位置虽然不在市区，但是进出还是比较方便的 装饰太老土了，另外能够配两把钥匙就好了，否则出行很不方便

- Localisation adaptée par rapport au centre ville,proximité supermarché promenade le long de la rivière,grandeur de ce logement incroyable,literie parfaite Odeurs nauséabondes dans la salle de bain des canalisations Un peu bruyant

- Super lokalita

Good apartment. Great location. - Location was outstanding. Accommodation was well equipped. The decorating was fun and colourful. Check-in is 4pm and we had to wait to be shown in. Self check-in would have been much better. The apartment had a bad plumbing smell when we got there and we had to air it out and the toilet brush holder was old and full of dirty toilet water.
Great for short visit - Location Decor and very small bedrooms

Great location - Great location and surprisingly quiet in a very lively area of the city. It was easy to catch a taxi, great restaurants all around a very short walking distance to include an iconic tapas bar that Hemingway frequented Close to Sol, The amenities were in need of repair. Microwave, hot water pot. For an apartment that is in this price range, the equipment was really cheap. For a little investment, they can make this a better experience
Spacy flat, good place. - Perfect place. TV didn´t work.

Buon appartamento in ottima zona! - Posizione fantastica, vicinissimo a Puerta del Sol e ai bellissimi locali limitrofi (non preoccupatevi del rumore notturno perché l appartamento è al quarto piano, affacciato all'interno di un palazzo molto silenzioso e si riposa bene la notte), l appartamento è spazioso (noi eravamo in 3, quindi una stanza ciascuno). Forse 4 o 5 persone stanno un po' strette perché una delle camere doppie è un po' piccolina... L arredamento non è recentissimo ma è comunque ok. C è un bagno piccolino secondario in aggiunta dove c e un wc e un piccolo lavabo ed è molto comodo se nello stesso momento servono due wc. Il bagno più grande è spazioso, l acqua arriva caldissima e c'è anche il bidet. C era un armadio rotto, segnalato già al nostro arrivo dal gentilissimo titolare e qualche altro pezzo di mobilia richiederebbe un po' di manutenzione, ma nulla di grave o che possa rovinare una vacanza .

lastPos.txt: We were not in the apartment much but it was a perfect location and the host was great!! - The location was perfect!! We were a family of 7 it was great!
